comment.body: I was looking at those levels also.  ES is stalling about where the gap is  on SPX between Tue 15Apr to Wed 16Apr (~SPX5367).  And that also coincides with a high time frame low volume node on ES from 2024 and also the LVN between the double distribution of that 14Apr week.  As big as the moves have been (e.g., the 10% move up on 9Apr on a similar tweet), I sort of expected more.  Almost like some higher time frame sellers were happy to short at ES5400.  Guess we'll wait and see how it plays out.
